title: SWTPM_INIT_LOCK in wolftpm-sys/src/swtpm.rs is pub but should be private
description: swtpm.rs line 10: SWTPM_INIT_LOCK is pub static. Callers (wolftpm, wolftpm-tss) only call init_swtpm(), not the mutex directly. Exposing the mutex lets callers lock it for arbitrary durations, bypassing the protection intent. Fix: remove pub from the static.
